subject: An armored figure in green high-tech suit with energy crackling around both hands, wearing a red headband and tinted goggles, standing in a sci-fi corridor
description: A humanoid figure in a form-fitting green armored suit stands in a wide, confident stance with both arms slightly raised, electric blue energy crackling visibly around both hands. The figure wears a red fabric headband, tinted green goggles pushed up, and a maroon belt or waist wrap over the suit. The face is clearly visible — broad, determined expression — and the setting behind them is a darkened corridor or interior space with architectural detail suggesting a futuristic or institutional structure. The energy in both hands gives the composition a charged, ready-for-battle quality.
foreground: Figure in green armored suit with blue energy crackling at both hands, red headband, goggles
background: Darkened sci-fi corridor with architectural wall panels
emotion: calm readiness and confident resolve; wide stance and direct forward gaze project steady preparation
